positive: A highly stylized, whimsical celestial whale swimming through a nebula-filled cosmic ocean. The whale should have bioluminescent accents and flowing, ethereal tail plumes. The background nebula features deep sapphire blues, vibrant magenta, and glowing emerald greens, rendered in a gradient watercolor style mixed with clean digital line art. Composition is centered, giving the whale a clear, recognizable silhouette against the vibrant background. The style should evoke deep-sea fantasy mixed with space exploration, ensuring strong contrast and high visual impact suitable for apparel print. Flat color blocking is preferred for print application details, with glowing highlights reserved for the main subject.
